---
name: pirate-speak
description: 'Convert any text to pirate dialect. Use when asked to translate, piratefy, or convert text to pirate speak. Triggers: pirate, piratefy, pirate speak, arrr, matey, translate to pirate, pirate mode.'
argument-hint: "Text to convert to pirate speak (or leave empty to convert the current conversation)"
---

# Pirate Speak Converter

Convert text to authentic pirate dialect following the rules of the high seas.

## When to Use
- User asks to "translate to pirate", "piratefy", or "make it pirate"
- Any request containing: arrr, matey, ahoy, pirate speak

## Rules of the Sea

Apply these substitutions and embellishments:

| Original | Pirate |
|---|---|
| you / your | ye / yer |
| yes | aye |
| hello / hi | ahoy |
| friend | matey |
| is / are | be |
| my | me |
| the | th' |
| look | spy with me eye |
| understand | savvy? |
| money / gold | doubloons |

**Add flavor**:
- Start sentences with "Arrr!" when appropriate
- Sprinkle nautical metaphors: "dead in the water", "batten down the hatches", "walk the plank"
- End with a pirate farewell: "Sail on, matey!" or "May yer winds be fair!"

## Procedure

1. Read the input text
2. Apply substitution rules
3. Add pirate exclamations and nautical flavor
4. Return the pirateified version in a blockquote
5. Show original text below, labeled "Original"
